title: S3eed Architect Bundle
body:
**🎉 This Resource Pack Adds 2 New Play Buttons 🎉**


---
## _**🎮 How to Install:**_

Download the pack (.zip file).

Move it to your resourcepacks folder.

Enable it in Minecraft Settings > Resource Packs.

---

<details>
<summary>Architect Hat</summary>

![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f101c7a72f8fea1122b383171964be1db33e9202.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Pencil</summary>

![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70e0727bbfc6f81f8a0213bdd4bcfd72c62b284c.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Layout Paper</summary>

![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d64b6c0d65d230aef6909d3e60869d82093a3beb.png)

</details>


**⛔ Dont Place it on the ground it wont work**

---
**✅ place it on a item frame**

---
